---
title: "Your Way"
subtitle: ""
date: 2026-02-23
date-modified: last-modified
author:
  - name: Andy Corrigan
    orcid: 0000-0002-3896-2489
    email: cudl@lib.cam.ac.uk
    url: https://www.cdh.cam.ac.uk/about/people/andy-corrigan/
license: "CC BY-NC 4.0"
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  pdf: default
  html: default
---
![](images/Labyriiinth-300x300.png){fig-alt="The Labyriiinth Icon"}  

## Learning Objective
Create your own IIIF Resource in order to share the results of your journey.  

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}

## Key Tools and Concepts
Exhibit, IIIF Manifest

:::

## Summary

Can you turn your screenshots and manifests into items that you can add to your journal?
